summary: Stage B fix round 4: REV-006 + REV-007 fixed. board.py now guards load_index (try/except OSError+ValueError -> one-line stderr + exit 2) and documents the exit-code contract (0 confirm / 1 cancel / 2 error); py_compile + --selftest green, missing/garbage --index/stdin exit 2 with no traceback, normal --headless --ship still exit 0. gogo-done Board mode launches nesting-safe (new-window inside tmux via wait-for; unique new-session -A -s gogo-done-$$ outside) and captures the board's own exit code, routing the three outcomes: result present -> ship each; code==1 no result -> real cancel (stop); missing code / exit 2 / other -> status-table + AskUserQuestion fallback (never a silent no-op). Version unchanged (0.7.0).
